title: Junior Business Development Manager at Supertech

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Supertech
jsonLd.description:
Supertech has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supertech:
Supertech is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supertech!
